steps.name: Schema migration: agent runtime, name, and sandbox_config fields
steps.criteria: Migration 0081 adds runtime, name, sandbox_config to agent table. Backfills runtime from agent_type. identity-bootstrap.ts writes runtime:'brain' for system agents. bun migrate applies cleanly.

steps.name: Schema migration: workspace sandbox provider setting
steps.criteria: Migration 0082 adds settings.sandbox_provider to workspace table. bun migrate applies cleanly.

steps.name: Agent domain types and query functions
steps.criteria: agents/types.ts exports domain types including AuthorityAction (11 actions). agents/queries.ts exports graph traversal, creation transaction, and deletion transaction functions.

steps.name: Agent CRUD route handlers and registration
steps.criteria: agents/routes.ts exports handlers for list, create, detail, check-name, delete. Routes registered in start-server.ts with Better Auth session auth and withTracing.

steps.name: Atomic creation transaction with proxy token generation
steps.criteria: POST /agents creates agent+identity+edges+scopes+token in one transaction. 11 actions default to propose. brp_ token returned for external agents. Rollback on failure.

steps.name: Atomic deletion transaction with edge cleanup
steps.criteria: DELETE /agents/:id validates confirm_name, removes all edges+identity+agent atomically. Brain agents rejected with 403. Session abort logic deferred to R2.

steps.name: Agent list, detail, and check-name endpoints
steps.criteria: GET /agents returns workspace agents via single-query graph traversal. GET /agents/:id returns detail with authority scopes. GET /agents/check-name returns { available: boolean }. Workspace isolation enforced.

steps.name: Walking skeleton acceptance tests
steps.criteria: walking-skeleton.test.ts passes all 4 scenarios: register external agent, view detail with scopes, delete with cleanup, list agents by runtime.

steps.name: External agent CRUD focused acceptance tests
steps.criteria: external-agent-crud.test.ts passes all 19 scenarios covering happy paths, error paths, and workspace isolation boundaries.

phases.name: Frontend: Agent Registry and Detail Pages

steps.name: Agents page route, nav link, and agent card component
steps.criteria: agents-page.tsx renders agent list grouped by runtime (brain/sandbox/external). agent-card.tsx shows name, description, runtime badge, and runtime-appropriate actions. Route registered in router.tsx at /agents. Nav link added to WorkspaceSidebar.

steps.name: Agent detail page with authority scopes display
steps.criteria: agent-detail-page.tsx renders agent config, authority scopes as action-permission pairs, and recent sessions. Route registered at /agents/$agentId. Back navigation returns to registry. Brain agents show read-only note.

steps.name: External agent creation form with authority scope configuration
steps.criteria: agent-create-page.tsx renders runtime selection then creation form. authority-scope-form.tsx renders 11 actions with permission dropdowns (auto/propose/blocked). Name field validates uniqueness via check-name endpoint. Create button posts to API.

steps.name: Proxy token dialog and delete confirmation
steps.criteria: proxy-token-dialog.tsx shows brp_ token once with copy button and connection instructions. Delete confirmation requires typing agent name. Empty states show create guidance per runtime section.

steps.name: Agent registry and card component tests
steps.criteria: agents-page.test.tsx verifies runtime grouping, brain View-only, external Edit action, empty state guidance, agent count header. agent-card.test.tsx verifies runtime badge and action buttons.

steps.name: Creation form, authority scope, and dialog tests
steps.criteria: agent-create-page.test.tsx verifies runtime selection, form fields, name uniqueness API call, submit payload. authority-scope-form.test.tsx verifies 11 actions with propose defaults. proxy-token-dialog.test.tsx verifies token display and copy.

validation.notes: Validated by CLI (VALID), gap analysis complete (7 issues resolved), automated quality gate passed (no HIGH findings)
